name: Aloha Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 1/2 ounces canned crushed pineapple in juice -- drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and milk. Mix until well blended on medium speed with an electric mixer.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the toasted macadamia nuts.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust in the springform pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly.
10. Before serving, top with sliced kiwi.
